description:
A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads.

AB Download Manager is a desktop app which lets you manage and organize your download files better than before.
1.6.8
This is a quick follow-up to version 1.6.7. If you're updating from an older version, make sure to also check the 1.6.7 release notes for important new features and improvements.
Fixed
- Can't change Auto Shutdown option if it was enabled
